prompt: Add the swan from the second image and the boat, along with its passengers, from the third image to the river in the first image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Add the white swan from image 2 and the light blue rowboat with its two passengers from image 3 into the river. Position the swan gracefully floating on the water in the mid-left portion of the river, and the rowboat with its passengers slightly to the right of the swan, in the central-left area of the river. Ensure both elements are seamlessly integrated into the existing twilight lighting, color palette, and reflections of the river in image 1, maintaining a photorealistic appearance.
objects: White swan gracefully floating on the water in the mid-left portion of the river
Light blue rowboat slightly to the right of the swan, in the central-left area of the river
Two passengers in the light blue rowboat
